title.en: Neill Blomkamp’s new zombie AI ‘film’ is just slop warmed over
title.zh: 尼尔·布洛姆坎普的新僵尸人工智能“电影”刚刚预热

summary.en: On Monday, District 9 and Gran Turismo director Neill Blomkamp unveiled his latest project: a 13-minute sci-fi short titled Nightborne that's loosely based on Peter Watts' 2014 no…
summary.zh: 周一，《第九区》和《Gran Turismo》导演尼尔·布洛姆坎普 (Neill Blomkamp) 公布了他的最新项目：一部名为《夜之子》的 13 分钟科幻短片，大致改编自彼得·瓦茨 (Peter Watts) 2014 年的电影《夜之子》(Nightborne)。

title.en: OpenAI says it accidentally hacked Hugging Face with a new AI system
title.zh: OpenAI 表示，它使用新的人工智能系统意外黑了 Hugging Face

summary.en: OpenAI says its AI models mistakenly breached open-source AI platform Hugging Face during internal testing. In a blog post on Tuesday, OpenAI writes that GPT-5.6 Sol and "an even…
summary.zh: OpenAI 表示，其人工智能模型在内部测试期间错误地破坏了开源人工智能平台 Hugging Face。 OpenAI 在周二的博客文章中写道，GPT-5.6 Sol 和“甚至……

title.en: OpenAI says Hugging Face was breached by its own pre-release models
title.zh: OpenAI 表示 Hugging Face 被其自己的预发布模型破坏

summary.en: OpenAI has come forward to claim responsibility for the Hugging Face breach, saying it was the result of internal testing gone awry.
summary.zh: OpenAI 已出面声称对 Hugging Face 漏洞负责，称这是内部测试出错的结果。

title.en: Google Releases Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber: A Cheaper, More Token-Efficient Flash Tier Built for Agentic Workloads
title.zh: Google 发布 Gemini 3.6 Flash、3.5 Flash-Lite 和 3.5 Flash Cyber​​：专为代理工作负载构建的更便宜、更高效的闪存层

summary.en: Google released Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber on July 21, 2026. The Flash tier gets cheaper and more token-efficient, with 3.6 Flash cutting output tokens…
summary.zh: 谷歌于 2026 年 7 月 21 日发布了 Gemini 3.6 Flash、3.5 Flash-Lite 和 3.5 Flash Cyber​​。Flash 层变得更便宜，代币效率更高，3.6 Flash 削减了输出代币……

title.en: Introducing the ChatGPT for small business program
title.zh: 推出适用于小型企业的 ChatGPT 计划

summary.en: OpenAI launches the ChatGPT for Small Businesses program, helping entrepreneurs build AI skills, automate work, and grow with ChatGPT Work.
summary.zh: OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT for Small Businesses 计划，帮助企业家培养 AI 技能、自动化工作并与 ChatGPT Work 一起成长。

title.en: Introducing Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber
title.zh: 隆重推出 Gemini 3.6 Flash、3.5 Flash-Lite 和 3.5 Flash Cyber

summary.en: We’re introducing new Gemini models, including Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite and 3.5 Flash Cyber.
summary.zh: 我们推出了新的 Gemini 型号，包括 Gemini 3.6 Flash、3.5 Flash-Lite 和 3.5 Flash Cyber​​。

title.zh: 通过材料科学创新推进下一代人工智能

title.en: Beyond grep: The case for a context-rich AI coding harness
title.zh: 超越 grep：上下文丰富的 AI 编码工具的案例

summary.en: Augment Code's Vinay Perneti talks models, harnesses, and context.
summary.zh: Augment Code 的 Vinay Perneti 谈论模型、工具和背景。

title.en: The AI compute gap: Enterprises are buying infrastructure faster than they can measure what it costs
title.zh: 人工智能计算差距：企业购买基础设施的速度快于他们能够衡量其成本的速度

summary.en: Across 107 enterprises, AI infrastructure spending is accelerating well ahead of the ability to see or steer its economics. Most organizations run their AI on a familiar base of h…
summary.zh: 在 107 家企业中，人工智能基础设施支出的加速增长远远超过了观察或引导其经济的能力。大多数组织都在熟悉的基础上运行人工智能……
